rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope or explicitly imported namespaces
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure all referenced identifiers in AGREE annex blocks are visible in the current scope
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Place implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
